title: taraxacum userinum
intro: Taraxacum userinum, also known as the Mongolian dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum userinum include its use as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, which can help to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of consuming Taraxacum userinum include reducing blood pressure, improving liver function, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum userinum often involve making teas or infusions from its leaves, roots, or flowers, which can be used to treat a range of conditions.
